events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing hanger nails (empty holes) in connectors/fasteners, rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant because Simpson hangers require specific nails in all holes to achieve listed loads. Missing nails = defective installation and non-compliant with manufacturer requirements and code (IRC references manufacturer installation instructions). Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural connector failure potential). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Confidence high.
